positive: A vibrant and detailed illustration of a mythical forest landscape, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora, glowing mushrooms, and delicate spirit fox motifs interwoven with geometric patterns. The composition should be centered and balanced, suitable for a textile print. Use a high contrast, deep jewel-toned color palette (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) with neon accents of cyan and lime green for the glow. The style should be a blend of Art Deco aesthetics and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print techniques, emphasizing sharp silhouettes and clean linework. The overall feeling should be magical, mysterious, and highly detailed. Full color, high resolution, print-ready.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, low contrast, mundane, photographic, poor detail
